creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Mathieu!

I don't see how:

runner cc -pipe -g -ggdb -gdwarf-2 -gstrict-dwarf -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-color-diagnostics -D_FUNCTION_DEF -g -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -
fPIC -D_REENTRANT -D_POSIX_PTHREAD_SEMANTICS -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES=NULL -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES_PROTO=extern void __samba_util_core_dummy_module_proto(v
oid) -MD -Idefault/include/public -I../include/public -Idefault/source4 -I../source4 -Idefault/lib -I../lib -Idefault/source4/lib -I../source4/lib -Idefault/source4/include
 -I../source4/include -Idefault/include -I../include -Idefault/lib/replace -I../lib/replace -Idefault -I.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -D_SAMB
A_BUILD_=4 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED=1 ../lib/util/time.c -c -o default/lib/util/time_20.o
[ 580/3564] Compiling lib/util/signal.c
runner cc -pipe -g -ggdb -gdwarf-2 -gstrict-dwarf -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-color-diagnostics -D_FUNCTION_DEF -g -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fPIC -D_REENTRANT -D_POSIX_PTHREAD_SEMANTICS -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES=NULL -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES_PROTO=extern void __samba_util_core_dummy_module_proto(void) -MD -Idefault/include/public -I../include/public -Idefault/source4 -I../source4 -Idefault/lib -I../lib -Idefault/source4/lib -I../source4/lib -Idefault/source4/include -I../source4/include -Idefault/include -I../include -Idefault/lib/replace -I../lib/replace -Idefault -I.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -D_SAMBA_BUILD_=4 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED=1 ../lib/util/signal.c -c -o default/lib/util/signal_20.o
[ 581/3564] Compiling lib/util/util.c
runner cc -pipe -g -ggdb -gdwarf-2 -gstrict-dwarf -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-color-diagnostics -D_FUNCTION_DEF -g -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fPIC -D_REENTRANT -D_POSIX_PTHREAD_SEMANTICS -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES=NULL -DSTATIC_samba_util_core_MODULES_PROTO=extern void __samba_util_core_dummy_module_proto(void) -MD -Idefault/include/public -I../include/public -Idefault/source4 -I../source4 -Idefault/lib -I../lib -Idefault/source4/lib -I../source4/lib -Idefault/source4/include -I../source4/include -Idefault/include -I../include -Idefault/lib/replace -I../lib/replace -Idefault -I.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -DLIBICONV_PLUG -D_SAMBA_BUILD_=4 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED=1 ../lib/util/util.c -c -o default/lib/util/util_20.o
../lib/util/time.c:48:9: warning: shifting a negative signed value is undefined [-Wshift-negative-value]
        return TIME_T_MAX;
               ^~~~~~~~~~
../lib/util/time.h:41:34: note: expanded from macro 'TIME_T_MAX'
#define TIME_T_MAX MIN(INT32_MAX,_TYPE_MAXIMUM(time_t))
                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
../lib/replace/replace.h:654:42: note: expanded from macro '_TYPE_MAXIMUM'
#define _TYPE_MAXIMUM(t) ((t) (~ (t) 0 - _TYPE_MINIMUM (t)))
                                         ^
../lib/replace/replace.h:653:22: note: expanded from macro '_TYPE_MINIMUM'
                              ? ~ (t) 0 << (sizeof (t) * CHAR_BIT - 1) : (t) 0))
                                        ^
/usr/include/sys/param.h:304:25: note: expanded from macro 'MIN'
#define MIN(a,b) (((a)<(b))?(a):(b))
                        ^
../lib/util/time.c:145:11: warning: shifting a negative signed value is undefined [-Wshift-negative-value]
        if (t == TIME_T_MAX || t == INT64_MAX) {
                 ^~~~~~~~~~
../lib/util/time.h:41:34: note: expanded from macro 'TIME_T_MAX'
#define TIME_T_MAX MIN(INT32_MAX,_TYPE_MAXIMUM(time_t))


is better than:

                                         ^

                                        ^

                        ^

                 ^~~~~~~~~~
